reason: Project boundary and non-negotiable TianChen-RV architecture rules for this implementation round.
Defines unified RISC-V MLIR boundaries and the evidence requirement for RVV hardware claims.
Defines RVV plugin selected vector-shape config, runtime AVL/VL separation, and finite RVV family expectations.
Defines plugin-owned interfaces and registry consumption instead of core extension-specific branches.
Defines the selected variant pipeline and bounded source-frontdoor route for finite binary RVV families.
Defines selected emission plan, target artifact export, runtime ABI, and fail-closed artifact boundaries.
Defines the common extension-family ops to EmitC route and rejects descriptor-to-C as production architecture.
Defines lit, C++ test, build, and ssh-rvv evidence expectations for RVV claims.
Pre-development guide for keeping RVV-specific behavior local to the plugin/target owners.
